MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS DENNIS S. WEAVER, SUZANNE MCDONNEL, AND MCDONNEL & WEAVER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Appearances:
DENNIS S. WEAVER, Esq. and SUZANNE MCDONNEL, Esq. of McDonnell & Weaver, 415/641-0700, defendants on their own behalf and moving parties.
